features.featureTitle: Fix the category filter functionality on the Home page (frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx) so that selecting 'All Hostels', 'Girls Only', 'Boys Only', or 'Co-Living' correctly filters the displayed hostel listings. Investigate whether the issue is in the CategoryFilter component state, the query hook (useGetHostelsByCategory vs useGetAllHostels), or the filtering logic applied to the hostel list, and ensure selecting each category tab shows only hostels matching that category (or all hostels for 'All').
